author: flutterspike
description: Copy the vault file or local file URL behind a link or file menu item to the Windows clipboard. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Ximkool
manifest.description: Copy the vault file or local file URL behind a link or file menu item to the Windows clipboard.
manifest.name: Copy Linked File

name: Copy Linked File

releases.author: flutterspike
releases.description:
Bug fix release.

- Support Markdown links that point to local file:/// URLs.
- Decode URL-encoded spaces and convert Windows drive-letter file URLs into copyable Windows paths.

releases.author: flutterspike
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Add Copy linked file action to Obsidian file and link context menus.
- Copy vault files to the Windows clipboard as file items.
- Support paths with spaces, commas, Unicode characters, and punctuation.
